# daytona_current_user_organization_invitations (Data Source)

Lists pending Daytona organization invitations for the authenticated user.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "daytona_current_user_organization_invitations" "example" {}

output "daytona_current_user_organization_invitations_count" {
  value = data.daytona_current_user_organization_invitations.example.total_count
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier.
- `items` (Attributes List) Pending organization invitations for the authenticated user. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--items))
- `total_count` (Number) Number of pending organization invitations for the authenticated user.

<a id="nestedatt--items"></a>
### Nested Schema for `items`

Read-Only:

- `assigned_role_ids` (Set of String) Custom organization role IDs assigned to the invitee.
- `created_at` (String) Invitation creation timestamp.
- `email` (String) Invited email address.
- `expires_at` (String) Invitation expiration timestamp.
- `id` (String) Invitation ID.
- `invited_by` (String) Email address of the inviter.
- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID.
- `organization_name` (String) Daytona organization name.
- `role` (String) Organization member role for the invitee.
- `status` (String) Invitation status.
- `updated_at` (String) Invitation update timestamp.
